creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Recently encountered: 

> Fatal error: uconnect(/var/run/dsbmd.socket): 
> Error: connect(/var/run/dsbmd.socket): No such file or directory 

Please consider dropping a hint, in a package message for each port:

# sysrc dsbmd_enable="YES"

Thanks

(I have mine set to NO, I can't remember why.)

<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/dsbmc/#message>

<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/dsbmc-cli/#message>

<https://vermaden.wordpress.com/2018/10/11/freebsd-desktop-part-17-automount-removable-media/>
